arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku drops early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca issue solved
arts.sum: Now, with European regular Nkunku expected to play against Shamrock, what is - in effect - a third team for as many matches is expected to be deployed. Astana and the next game - a Premier League date with Brentford - came and went with two victories for Chelsea as the future and present helped keep the momentum going.

arts.ttl: 'How have Barca let him go?' Meet Chelsea's 18-year-old future 'star'
arts.sum: Marc Guiu, 18, could be a "big star" for Chelsea after scoring a hat-trick against Shamrock Rovers in the Conference League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall could leave in January, admits Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca admits that there are no guarantees that Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall will spend the second half of the season at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea youngster Marc Guiu 'can go all the way', insists Joe Cole after his first-half hat-trick as former Blues star insists 'Barcelona have made a real mistake' letting him go
arts.sum: After emerging from the Catalan club's famed La Masia academy, Guiu arrived at Stamford Bridge in July after the Blues triggered the £5m release clause in his contract.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Chelsea youngsters pass European test but what's next?
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' James Cole and Sky Sports football journalist David Richardson analyse Chelsea's 5-1 win over Shamrock Rovers and what's next for Enzo Maresca's youngsters.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca keen to temper expectations about teenage hat-trick hero Marc Guiu
arts.sum: The 18-year-old striker fired Chelsea to a 5-1 win over Shamrock.

arts.ttl: Chelsea next five fixtures compared to Arsenal and Liverpool in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Before Chelsea, no side in the Conference League had ever scored more than 18 goals in the group stage of the competition. Crystal Palace (A) - Premier League - Saturday, January 4

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings vs Shamrock Rovers as Guiu wonderful and George bright
arts.sum: Guiu, though, was on hand to take advantage of another mistake later in the first-half and score his second goal of the night. Marc Guiu opened the scoring on 22 minutes after a defensive error from Darragh Burns allowed the Spaniard to have an open goal.

arts.ttl: Guiu hat trick helps Chelsea rout Rovers 5-1 to extend Conference League dominance
arts.sum: Rolando Mandragora netted for Fiorentina three minutes from time to salvage a 1-1 draw at Vitória, a result that gave the Portuguese team second place with 14 points. Marc Guiu’s first-half hat trick helped Chelsea ease past Shamrock Rovers 5-1 on Thursday to complete the league phase of the UEFA Conference League with a 100% record.

arts.ttl: Marc Guiu hat-trick helps Chelsea finish off overpowered Shamrock Rovers
arts.sum: Chelsea signed off with a perfect record in the league phase of the Conference League as Marc Guiu scored a first-half hat-trick to seal a 5-1 demolition of League of Ireland side Shamrock Rovers at Stamford Bridge. The 18-year-old former Barcelona striker is yet to start for Enzo Maresca in the Premier League but, selected for the fourth time in Europe, he demonstrated a poacher’s instinct to bury the visiting side, twice intercepting passes back to the goalkeeper to score before glancing in a fine header for his third.
